message.content:
import { Map, Swords, Trophy, Target, Shield, Sparkles, Users, Settings, Briefcase, Zap } from 'lucide-react'
import { Callout } from '@/components/mdx/Callout'
import { Card, CardGrid } from '@/components/mdx/CardGrid'
import { Checklist } from '@/components/mdx/Checklist'
import { FAQ } from '@/components/mdx/FAQ'
import { Steps, Step } from '@/components/mdx/Steps'
import { Section } from '@/components/mdx/Section'
import { YouTubeEmbed } from '@/components/mdx/YouTubeEmbed'

export const metadata = {
  title: "Bizarre Lineage Gang: Complete Creation & Management Guide 2026",
  description: "Master the Bizarre Lineage gang system with our 2026 guide. Learn how to fix logo ID errors, bypass name filters, and dominate Gang Wars effectively.",
  category: "Guide",
  image: "https://placehold.co/800x400/1e293b/fff?text=Bizarre+Lineage+Gang+Guide",
  date: "2026-03-04",
  author: "Bizarre Lineage Wiki Team"
}

<Callout type="info" title="Quick Guide">
- **Bizarre Lineage Gang**: Also known as Clans, these are essential for unlocking high-level PvP content like Gang Wars and Territories.
- **Logo ID Fix**: You must use the **Image Asset ID**, not the Decal ID, to avoid the "Emblem Must Be Valid" error.
- **Name Filtering**: Use simple English characters without symbols or spaces to bypass current bugged name filters.
- **Gang Points**: Earned through contracts and spent in the Gang Shop for rare items like **DIO's Bone** and **Lucky Arrows**.
- **Fame System**: Gain 5 Fame per overworld kill while in a gang to climb the global rankings.
</Callout>

Forming a **bizarre lineage gang** is the ultimate way to assert dominance in the JoJo-inspired world of Morioh-cho. Whether you are looking to conquer territories or simply want a group of reliable allies for high-level raids, understanding the mechanics of a **bizarre lineage gang** is essential for long-term progression and social prestige. In this comprehensive 2026 guide, we will break down every aspect of the clan system, from the initial creation process to advanced management strategies. We will also address common technical hurdles, such as the notorious "Emblem Must Be Valid" error and the sensitive name filters that often prevent players from finalizing their groups. By the end of this article, you will have all the tools necessary to lead a top-tier faction and secure exclusive rewards through the Gang Shop and Territory control.

<Section icon={Users} title="Founding Your Bizarre Lineage Gang">

Establishing a clan is the first step toward competitive play. In Bizarre Lineage, gangs function as more than just social circles; they are structured organizations that provide passive buffs, income, and access to unique mission boards. To start, you need to navigate to the main menu and locate the specific icon designated for social groups.

**Video Highlights:**
- Coordination strategies for the Yoshikage Kira raid.
- Optimal Stand combinations for group-based PvE.
- Efficient movement techniques across the Morioh map.
- Team-based positioning to avoid explosive bomb damage.

<YouTubeEmbed videoId="h8IdJWIhoU8" title="The Fastest Kira Raid Guide" />

Before you can invite your friends, you must meet the basic requirements for creation. Note that these requirements may fluctuate based on game updates, but the core process remains consistent.

| Requirement | Description | Note |
| :--- | :--- | :--- |
| **Player Level** | Minimum level required to lead | Usually Level 30+ |
| **Currency** | Initial creation fee | Paid in in-game Cash |
| **Gang Name** | A unique identifier for your group | Subject to filters |
| **Logo ID** | A valid Roblox Image Asset ID | Must be an Image ID |
| **Member Limit** | Starting capacity for the gang | Can be upgraded later |

<Callout type="tip" title="Leader Prerequisite">
Ensure you have a stable Stand build before founding a gang. As a leader, you will often be the primary target in Gang Wars, so high Vitality and Stand Power are recommended.
</Callout>

</Section>

<Section icon={Settings} title="Fixing Logo ID and Name Filter Issues">

The most common frustration for new leaders is the "Emblem Must Be Valid" error. This typically occurs because players copy the **Decal ID** from the Roblox URL rather than the **Image Asset ID**. Bizarre Lineage requires the specific ID tied to the image file itself to render the logo in-game.

<Steps>
  <Step num="1" title="Upload Your Asset">
    Go to the Roblox "Create" page, navigate to "Creations," and upload your desired image under the "Development Items" tab.
  </Step>
  <Step num="2" title="Locate the Image Tab">
    After uploading, do not copy the ID from the Decals tab. Instead, switch to the **Images** tab within your creator dashboard.
  </Step>
  <Step num="3" title="Copy Asset ID">
    Click the three dots next to your image and select **Copy Asset ID**. This numeric code is what you must paste into the game.
  </Step>
  <Step num="4" title="Finalize Creation">
    Enter your Gang Name and paste the ID. If the name is rejected, try removing all spaces and special characters.
  </Step>
</Steps>

<Callout type="warning" title="Filter Bug Alert">
As of 2026, the name filter is highly sensitive. If your name is "filtered" despite being clean, try using all lowercase letters or a single word without any capital letters in the middle.
</Callout>

</Section>

<Section icon={Briefcase} title="Gang Contracts and the Gang Shop">

Once your **bizarre lineage gang** is active, you gain access to the Gang Contractor NPC. This NPC provides specialized missions that are significantly more rewarding than standard street quests. Completing these contracts earns your group **Gang Points**, which are the primary currency for the exclusive Gang Shop.

| Item Name | Cost (Points) | Primary Benefit |
| :--- | :--- | :--- |
| **Lucky Arrow** | High | Increased chance for Legendary Stands |
| **DIO's Bone** | Very High | Required for evolving specific Stands |
| **Stand Stat Essence** | Medium | Reroll or boost specific Stand stats |
| **Rare Chest** | Low | Contains random cosmetics and materials |
| **Hammer** | Medium | Used for specific crafting or events |

<Callout type="success" title="Profit Maximization">
Always run Gang Contracts in a full party. The rewards scale with the number of gang members participating, making it the most efficient way to farm for a **Lucky Arrow**.
</Callout>

</Section>

<Section icon={Swords} title="Competitive Mechanics: Fame and Territories">

The true endgame for any clan lies in the Fame system and Territory control. Fame acts as your gang's global ELO rating. Every time a member kills a player from a rival gang in the overworld, the group earns 5 Fame. Conversely, losing members in combat can lower your standing.

<CardGrid cols={2}>
  <Card title="Gang Territories">
    - **Passive Income**: Control zones to generate hourly cash.
    - **Exclusive Perks**: Certain zones provide XP or damage buffs.
    - **Defense**: Must be actively defended from rival sieges.
  </Card>
  <Card title="Gang Wars">
    - **Instanced PvP**: Team-based battles in a dedicated arena.
    - **Ranked Rewards**: Earn exclusive titles and PvP tokens.
    - **Matchmaking**: Face off against gangs of similar Fame levels.
  </Card>
</CardGrid>

Territories are marked on the map and can be captured by standing within the zone while no enemies are present. Controlling major hubs like the Morioh Train Station or Cairo Streets provides the highest rewards but invites the most conflict.

<Callout type="info" title="Fame Calculation">
Fame is updated in real-time. If you are farming XP using the treadmill method, ensure you are in a safe zone, as being killed while AFK will significantly hurt your gang's Fame rating.
</Callout>

</Section>

<Section icon={Trophy} title="Daily Management Checklist">

To maintain a top-tier gang, leaders and officers should follow a consistent daily routine. This ensures the group remains active in the rankings and that the treasury stays full for future expansions.

<Checklist
  id="gang-daily-goals"
  title="Leader's Daily Routine:"
  items={[
    "Complete at least 3 Gang Contracts for points",
    "Check Territory status and reinforce weak points",
    "Monitor Fame gains and prune inactive members",
    "Coordinate a group raid (Kira or DIO) for materials",
    "Distribute rewards from the Gang Shop to top contributors"
  ]}
/>

</Section>

<Section icon={Zap} title="Bizarre Lineage Gang FAQ">

Understanding the nuances of the clan system can be difficult for new players. Here are the most frequently asked questions regarding gang management and mechanics.

<FAQ items={[
  {
    question: "Why does it say 'Emblem Must Be Valid' when I use a real ID?",
    answer: "You are likely using a Decal ID. You must go to the Roblox Creator Dashboard, find your upload under the 'Images' tab (not Decals), and copy the Asset ID from there."
  },
  {
    question: "How do I get more Gang Points quickly?",
    answer: "The fastest way is to complete Gang Contracts provided by the Gang Contractor NPC. Doing these in a group increases the efficiency and point yield per hour."
  },
  {
    question: "What is the benefit of controlling a Territory?",
    answer: "Territories provide passive cash income and exclusive buffs for all gang members. They are essential for funding high-level gear and Stand evolutions."
  },
  {
    question: "Can I change my Gang Name after creation?",
    answer: "Currently, name changes are restricted. You would need to disband and recreate the gang, so choose your name carefully and avoid the filter bugs."
  }
]} />

</Section>
